-------------------- Start of forwarded message --------------------
Date: Mon, 24 Aug 2009 09:10:42 +0200
From: Mats Andreassen <matsa@pvv.ntnu.no>
User-Agent: Thunderbird 2.0.0.22 (X11/20090820)
To: Mikolaj Golub <to.my.trociny@gmail.com>
Subject: Re: misc/138017: pkg_delete starts segfaulting during upgrading of
 ports

Mikolaj Golub wrote:
> It looks like the same problem that was reported in bin/135159.
> 
> I suppose you have @pkgdep command in /var/db/pkg/kdelibs/+CONTENTS file
> without argument. Removing this line could be workaround.
> 

Hi!

Thank you very much for the workaround. I can now confirm that my
problem is a duplicate of said PR.

--
regards
Mats Andreassen

-------------------- End of forwarded message --------------------

-- 
Mikolaj Golub
